description: Backend data contract for Parents page – list, search, filter, stats, detail view, and parent engagement summary.

getStats.description: Get summary statistics for the top cards (total parents, total children linked, high engagement count, pending notifications, average attendance).

data.totalPendingNotifications: number (sum of unread/pending notifications across all parents)

getParents.description: Fetch paginated list of parents with filtering, search, and optional engagement level filter.

queryParams.search: string (optional, searches parent name, email, child name)
queryParams.engagement: enum: all, high, medium, low (optional, default all)

parents.name: string
parents.lastSeen: string (e.g., '2 min ago' or ISO datetime – frontend formats)

getParentById.description: Get full details of a single parent (used for the detail panel). Response includes same fields as getParents plus optional recent notifications.

getFilterOptions.description: Available engagement levels for filter dropdown (based on actual data or static).

exportParents.description: Export filtered parent list as CSV (same query params as getParents, no pagination).
exportParents.response: CSV file download with columns: name, email, phone, location, linkedChildren, avgAttendance, engagement, pendingNotifications, joinedDate

fieldNotes.avatarColor: Frontend typically computes deterministic color based on parent name or ID; backend may ignore or return a CSS class name.
fieldNotes.lastSeen: Backend may return ISO datetime; frontend formats as relative time (e.g., '2 min ago').
fieldNotes.joinedDate: Month and year string (e.g., 'Jan 2024') – backend can send a formatted date or ISO from which frontend extracts month/year.
fieldNotes.recentNotifications: Only returned in detail endpoint; includes a short list of latest notifications for the parent (max 5).
fieldNotes.averageAttendance: Computed as average of attendance percentages of all linked children; returned in stats endpoint as string with '%'.
